name: Feature request

title: "[FEATURE] "

---

## 💡 Feature Request

### 📋 Summary
Briefly describe the feature or idea.

---

### 🎯 Problem / Use Case
What problem does this solve?  
Why is this feature needed?

---

### 💭 Proposed Solution
Describe how you think this should work.

---

### 🔄 Alternatives Considered
Have you thought of any other approaches?

---

### 🖼️ Mockups / Examples (optional)
Add screenshots, sketches, or examples if helpful.

---

### 🧠 Additional Notes
Anything else that might help explain the idea.
